evaluators.name: Weekly Cheapest 5-Gallon Spring Subscription in Cart
evaluators.description: Checks that the user added a weekly Monday subscription for 2 units of the cheapest 5-gallon spring water under $15 to their active cart.

evaluators.name: Three Sparkling Case Sizes One-Time Order
evaluators.description: Checks that the user placed a runtime one-time order containing one 500 ml, one 1 L, and one 5 L sparkling water case, each under $12, with no extra sparkling case sizes.

evaluators.name: Best One-Time Promo on Three 1L Still Cases
evaluators.description: Checks that the user used the highest-percentage promo applicable to one-time orders and applied it to a cart or order with three 1 L still 12-bottle cases.

evaluators.name: Update First Weekly Subscription to Every 2 Weeks, 3 Units, Wednesday
evaluators.description: Checks that the first active weekly water subscription (originally weekly on Monday, quantity 2) was updated to every 2 weeks on Wednesday with quantity 3 and remains active.

evaluators.name: Add New Address and Reschedule Delivery to 15th Next Month 3–6 PM
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a new Home address at 123 Oak Street, Springfield, CA 12345 and rescheduled some delivery to that address on the 15th of next month in the 3–6 PM window with standard delivery.

evaluators.name: Eco-Friendly Recycled Case + 5-Gallon Jug in Cart
evaluators.description: Checks that the active cart contains a one-time eco-friendly recycled-packaging bottled case and a one-time eco-friendly 5-gallon refillable jug, all within the specified rating and price filters.

evaluators.name: Help Center Minimum Order + Cart Quantity Adjustment
evaluators.description: Checks that the user searched for the minimum order amount article, opened it, added a water product to the cart, and increased its quantity so that its line subtotal and the cart subtotal meet or exceed the site minimum order amount.

evaluators.name: Rental Dispenser + Four 5-Gallon Bottles Within 7-Day Delivery
evaluators.description: Checks that the user placed a runtime order with an affordable dispenser rental (≤ $20/month) for 1 month, added four still 5-gallon water bottles, and scheduled standard delivery within the next 7 days.
